'''√?-ch-?''' ('''aech''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swim|swim]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ?-ch-?
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swim|swim]]
|-
! Citation form
| √?-ch-?
|-
! Lemma
| aech
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thi?acha?|thi?acha?]] || [[word:ji?acha?|ji?acha?]] || [[word:shi?acha?|shi?acha?]] || [[word:ki?acha?|ki?acha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthu?acha?|thuthu?acha?]] || [[word:juju?acha?|juju?acha?]] || [[word:shushu?acha?|shushu?acha?]] || [[word:kuku?acha?|kuku?acha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thu?acha?|thu?acha?]] || [[word:ju?acha?|ju?acha?]] || [[word:shu?acha?|shu?acha?]] || [[word:ku?acha?|ku?acha?]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thu?acha?|thu?acha?]] || [[word:ju?acha?|ju?acha?]] || [[word:shu?acha?|shu?acha?]] || [[word:ku?acha?|ku?acha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:the?acha?|the?acha?]] || [[word:je?acha?|je?acha?]] || [[word:she?acha?|she?acha?]] || [[word:ke?acha?|ke?acha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotho?acha?|thotho?acha?]] || [[word:jojo?acha?|jojo?acha?]] || [[word:shosho?acha?|shosho?acha?]] || [[word:koko?acha?|koko?acha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tho?acha?|tho?acha?]] || [[word:jo?acha?|jo?acha?]] || [[word:sho?acha?|sho?acha?]] || [[word:ko?acha?|ko?acha?]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tho?acha?|tho?acha?]] || [[word:jo?acha?|jo?acha?]] || [[word:sho?acha?|sho?acha?]] || [[word:ko?acha?|ko?acha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæ?acha?|thæ?acha?]] || [[word:jæ?acha?|jæ?acha?]] || [[word:shæ?acha?|shæ?acha?]] || [[word:kæ?acha?|kæ?acha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatha?acha?|thatha?acha?]] || [[word:jaja?acha?|jaja?acha?]] || [[word:shasha?acha?|shasha?acha?]] || [[word:kaka?acha?|kaka?acha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tha?acha?|tha?acha?]] || [[word:ja?acha?|ja?acha?]] || [[word:sha?acha?|sha?acha?]] || [[word:ka?acha?|ka?acha?]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tha?acha?|tha?acha?]] || [[word:ja?acha?|ja?acha?]] || [[word:sha?acha?|sha?acha?]] || [[word:ka?acha?|ka?acha?]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sha?acha?|sha?acha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosha?acha?|gosha?acha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisha?acha?|gokisha?acha?]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sha?acha?nü|sha?acha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nknü|gosha?acha?nknü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?nü|gokisha?acha?nü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sha?acha?shë|sha?acha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkshë|gosha?acha?nkshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?shë|gokisha?acha?shë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?acha?ro|sha?acha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkro|gosha?acha?nkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?ro|gokisha?acha?ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?acha?mu|sha?acha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkmu|gosha?acha?nkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?mu|gokisha?acha?mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sha?acha?sher|sha?acha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nksher|gosha?acha?nksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?sher|gokisha?acha?sher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sha?acha?ng|sha?acha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkng|gosha?acha?nkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?ng|gokisha?acha?ng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sha?acha?ya|sha?acha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkya|gosha?acha?nkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?ya|gokisha?acha?ya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sha?acha?yam|sha?acha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkyam|gosha?acha?nkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?yam|gokisha?acha?yam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?acha?nüshë|sha?acha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nknüshë|gosha?acha?nknüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?nüshë|gokisha?acha?nüshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?acha?nüro|sha?acha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nknüro|gosha?acha?nknüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?nüro|gokisha?acha?nüro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?acha?nümu|sha?acha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nknümu|gosha?acha?nknümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?nümu|gokisha?acha?nümu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?acha?shënü|sha?acha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkshënü|gosha?acha?nkshënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?shënü|gokisha?acha?shënü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?acha?shëro|sha?acha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkshëro|gosha?acha?nkshëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?shëro|gokisha?acha?shëro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?acha?shëmu|sha?acha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkshëmu|gosha?acha?nkshëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?shëmu|gokisha?acha?shëmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?acha?ronü|sha?acha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkronü|gosha?acha?nkronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?ronü|gokisha?acha?ronü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?acha?roshë|sha?acha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkroshë|gosha?acha?nkroshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?roshë|gokisha?acha?roshë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sha?acha?romu|sha?acha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkromu|gosha?acha?nkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?romu|gokisha?acha?romu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sha?acha?munü|sha?acha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkmunü|gosha?acha?nkmunü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?munü|gokisha?acha?munü]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sha?acha?mushë|sha?acha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkmushë|gosha?acha?nkmushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?mushë|gokisha?acha?mushë]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sha?acha?muro|sha?acha?muro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosha?acha?nkmuro|gosha?acha?nkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisha?acha?muro|gokisha?acha?muro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
